name: manivtha-tours-travels
description: Travel and Transportation Website for Manivtha Tours & Travels

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: node ./node_modules/concurrently/dist/bin/concurrently.js "cd backend && node src/server.js" "cd frontend && node node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js"
